creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Two minor issues, one major.  Minor issues can be fixed by running 
portlint -N, then portlint -abt before you submit anything.  Two minor 
issues are you included a $Freebsd line from another Makefile, not 
standard for new port, second, you whoudl not use PORTREVISION for a new 
port.  I fixed that.  The part that I won't fix is the rc_subr script. 
See this, and send me a new rc-subr file. 
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/rc-scripts.html
